steps.title: Spot the key phrase
steps.content: "Help to ______ feelings of comfort" is the decisive clue. The "help to" paired with comfort signals a verb meaning to create or produce.

steps.title: Match the word
steps.content:
The verb needs to mean produce or bring about, filling "help to ___ feelings of comfort." Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — engender: to cause or give rise to — fits perfectly: humanoid features help produce feelings of comfort in people. ✓
  • Choice B — constrict: to tighten or restrict — would mean the features reduce comfort, the opposite of what the passage says. ✗
  • Choice C — counterbalance: to offset or neutralize — would mean the features cancel out comfort rather than create it. ✗
  • Choice D — repudiate: to reject or deny — would mean the features reject comfort, which contradicts the passage entirely. ✗
That confirms A is correct.
